charts.title: ✓ Validation PASS — reproduces the paper's behaviour
charts.caption: Heterotypic contacts dominate (checkerboard mixing)
charts.simulations: Validation report card. The PASS/FAIL badge is the result of an automated acceptance test (pbg_cpm_studies.gg1993.validate) evaluated against this study's own reproduced metric time series — not a hand-set verdict. light-dark fraction > 0.5 and larger than light-light & dark-dark

charts.title: Fig 7
charts.caption: checkerboard pattern at 10/100/1000/2000 MCS.
charts.simulations: GENERATED by pbg-cpm — our own Cellular Potts simulation output. This reproduces the paper's setup (its exact contact energies, initial condition, temperature/λ and the 1 MCS = 16 sweeps convention) and is named after the paper's figure it corresponds to. It is NOT scanned, traced, or copied from the PDF, and no published data points are overlaid — every value is computed from our simulation run for this study.
charts.interpretation: gamma_ld<0 yields a defect-ridden checkerboard with dominant light-dark contact and two transitions (~T=0 freeze, ~T=15 mixing), matching Figs 7-9 and Table I.

charts.title: Fig 9
charts.caption: l-l, l-d, l-M interfaces vs MCS across T.
charts.simulations: GENERATED by pbg-cpm — our own Cellular Potts simulation output. This reproduces the paper's setup (its exact contact energies, initial condition, temperature/λ and the 1 MCS = 16 sweeps convention) and is named after the paper's figure it corresponds to. It is NOT scanned, traced, or copied from the PDF, and no published data points are overlaid — every value is computed from our simulation run for this study.
charts.interpretation: gamma_ld<0 yields a defect-ridden checkerboard with dominant light-dark contact and two transitions (~T=0 freeze, ~T=15 mixing), matching Figs 7-9 and Table I.

charts.title: Table I
charts.caption: bulk moments vs temperature.
charts.simulations: GENERATED by pbg-cpm — our own Cellular Potts simulation output. This reproduces the paper's setup (its exact contact energies, initial condition, temperature/λ and the 1 MCS = 16 sweeps convention) and is named after the paper's figure it corresponds to. It is NOT scanned, traced, or copied from the PDF, and no published data points are overlaid — every value is computed from our simulation run for this study.
charts.interpretation: gamma_ld<0 yields a defect-ridden checkerboard with dominant light-dark contact and two transitions (~T=0 freeze, ~T=15 mixing), matching Figs 7-9 and Table I.
